name: hcportal_getUsageData
description: Returns comprehensive platform usage statistics for the HC admin portal, including: app version distribution (iOS vs Android), integration job status, usage metrics across multiple data types (Account, Activity, Event, Kennel, Login, Payment, Portal, Error) over various time periods (last hour, day, week, month), recent login details by user, and recently updated/active events. Provides insights for platform health monitoring and user engagement analysis.

parameters.name: publicHasherId
parameters.description: Auth: user identifier for authentication. Validated by DATALENGTH = 16 bytes.

parameters.name: accessToken
parameters.description: Auth: short-lived cryptographic token validated via HC.CHECK_PORTAL_ACCESS_TOKEN.

parameters.name: ipAddress
parameters.description: Client IP address. Passed through to LOG.GeneralLog but never validated or used in main logic (dead input).

parameters.name: ipGeoDetails
parameters.description: IP geolocation JSON. Stored in LOG.GeneralLog data field. Falls back to placeholder JSON if NULL (dead input).

rowsets.description: Uses errorType codes 2 (validation: null/invalid publicHasherId) and 3 (auth: invalid access token). Returns on validation or auth failure.

rowsets.name: VersionData
rowsets.description: App version distribution showing iOS vs Android usage. Aggregates latest login records from the last 14 days where HcVersion matches pattern 'HC Ver:%' and SystemName is not empty.

columns.name: versionNum
columns.description: App version number extracted from HcVersion (before the '-' delimiter)

columns.name: buildNum
columns.description: Build number extracted from HcVersion (after the '-' delimiter)

columns.name: isiPhone
columns.description: Count of iOS users on this version

columns.name: isNotiPhone
columns.description: Count of non-iOS (Android) users on this version

rowsets.name: IntegrationJobData
rowsets.description: Latest integration job run statistics for the most recent 10 integrations. Shows which background data sync jobs have completed, when they ran, and success/failure counts.

columns.name: integrationAbbreviation
columns.description: Short name for the integration (e.g. 'FB', 'GCal')

columns.name: integrationEnabled
columns.description: Whether this integration is currently enabled (0=disabled, non-zero=enabled)

columns.name: interval
columns.description: Scheduled interval in minutes between integration runs

columns.name: integrationId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the integration

columns.name: recordsRead
columns.description: Number of records read in the last job

columns.name: recordsWritten
columns.description: Number of records successfully written in the last job

columns.name: recordsFailedInfo
columns.description: JSON or text details about failed record imports

columns.name: errorCount
columns.description: Number of errors encountered in the last job

columns.name: errorInfo
columns.description: JSON or text details about errors

columns.name: endedAt
columns.description: Timestamp when the last job completed

columns.name: minutesAgo
columns.description: Minutes elapsed since the last job completed (computed as DATEDIFF from endedAt to GETDATE())

columns.name: kennelsSucceeded
columns.description: Number of kennels successfully synced

columns.name: kennelsSucceededInfo
columns.description: Details about successfully synced kennels

columns.name: kennelsFailed
columns.description: Number of kennels that failed to sync

columns.name: kennelsFailedInfo
columns.description: Details about kennels that failed to sync

columns.name: futureRunCount
columns.description: Total count of future runs (events with EventStartDatetimeIndexed > GETDATE()). Same value repeated for all rows.

rowsets.name: UsageStatistics
rowsets.description: Usage metrics for different data types across multiple time windows. Each row represents a data type (Account, Activity, Event, Kennel, Login, Payment, Portal, Error) with counts for last hour, day, week, and month, plus comparison periods.

columns.name: dataType
columns.description: Type of data being measured: Account, Activity, Event, Kennel, Login, Payment, Portal, or Error

columns.name: id
columns.description: Sort order identifier (0-7) for the data type

columns.name: lastHour
columns.description: Count of records created/updated in the last hour

columns.name: lastHourComp
columns.description: Count from the hour before last (comparison baseline)

columns.name: lastDay
columns.description: Count of records created/updated in the last 24 hours

columns.name: lastDayComp
columns.description: Count from the 24 hours before that (comparison baseline)

columns.name: lastWeek
columns.description: Count of records created/updated in the last 7 days

columns.name: lastWeekComp
columns.description: Count from the 7 days before that (comparison baseline)

columns.name: lastMonth
columns.description: Count of records created/updated in the last 30 days

columns.name: lastMonthComp
columns.description: Count from the 30 days before that (comparison baseline)

rowsets.name: LoginInformation
rowsets.description: Detailed login information for users who logged in within the last 24 hours. Grouped by user, device type, OS version, HC version, and kennel. Includes computed highlight flags for outdated versions.

columns.name: userName
columns.description: Display name of the user (from Hasher.DisplayName computed column)

columns.name: userId
columns.description: User's unique identifier

columns.name: realName
columns.description: User's first and last name concatenated with a space

columns.name: photo
columns.description: User's photo URL

columns.name: isIphone
columns.description: Device type flag: 1=iPhone, 0=non-iPhone, -1=NULL DeviceType (sentinel)

columns.name: systemVersion
columns.description: OS version (first 5 chars of SystemVersion with '/' removed). Empty string if NULL.

columns.name: loginCount
columns.description: Number of logins in the last 24 hours for this user/device/version combination

columns.name: lastLoginDate
columns.description: Most recent login timestamp for this combination

columns.name: minutesSinceLastLogin
columns.description: Minutes elapsed since last login (computed as DATEDIFF from lastLoginDate to GETDATE())

columns.name: kennelName
columns.description: User's home kennel name. Empty string if NULL.

columns.name: kennelShortName
columns.description: User's home kennel short name. Empty string if NULL.

columns.name: hcVersion
columns.description: HC app version (portion before first comma in HcVersion)

columns.name: highlightPhoneVersion
columns.description: Computed highlight priority for phone OS version: 0=current (26.x, 37+), 1=recent (18.x, 17.x, 34-36), 2=older (16.x, 15.x, 30-33), 3=outdated (all others)

columns.name: highlightHcVersion
columns.description: Computed highlight priority for HC version: 0=current (2.1+), 1=recent (1.6+), 2=older (1.5+), 3=outdated (1.2, 1.1.x, all others)

rowsets.name: RecentEvents
rowsets.description: Union of recently updated events and most active events (by HasherEventMap activity in last 24 hours). Shows events within 48 hours (2880 minutes) of start time that are visible. Deduplicated via DISTINCT.

columns.name: kennelName
columns.description: Kennel name hosting the event

columns.name: kennelShortName
columns.description: Kennel short name

columns.name: kennelLogo
columns.description: Kennel logo URL

columns.name: eventName
columns.description: Event name (uses FbEventName if UseFbRunDetails != 0, otherwise EventName)

columns.name: minutesAgoUpdated
columns.description: Minutes elapsed since the event was last updated (computed as DATEDIFF from updatedAt to GETDATE())

columns.name: minutesAgoCreated
columns.description: Minutes elapsed since the event was created (computed as DATEDIFF from createdAt to GETDATE())

columns.name: minutesUntilRun
columns.description: Minutes until the event starts (computed as DATEDIFF from GETDATE() to EventStartDatetime). Negative if event has already started.

columns.name: activityLastDay
columns.description: Count of HasherEventMap records updated in the last 24 hours for this event (subquery count)

columns.name: publicEventId
columns.description: Public identifier for the event

sideEffects: INSERT into HC.ErrorLog on validation failures (lines 27, 47)
INSERT into LOG.GeneralLog on every call after validation (line 62) - logs portal access with IP data

codeSmells.detail: SET NOCOUNT ON is present but SET XACT_ABORT ON is missing. Runtime errors will not auto-rollback.
The entire SP has no error handling. If any query fails (especially INSERT into LOG.GeneralLog or ErrorLog), the error propagates unhandled to the caller.

Line 21: Uses DATALENGTH(@publicHasherId) != 16 to validate a UNIQUEIDENTIFIER. DATALENGTH is correct for GUIDs (always 16 bytes), but LEN() is the standard for other string checks elsewhere in the codebase. This is actually correct usage, but inconsistent with string validation patterns.

Line 84: Uses DATALENGTH(ll.SystemName) > 4 to filter login records. Should use LEN() instead. DATALENGTH returns byte count (2x char count for NVARCHAR), so this actually checks for > 2 characters, not > 4.
Line 64: Logs 'Admin Portal: hcportal_getKennelHashers' but the actual SP name is hcportal_getUsageData. Copy-paste error from another SP.
@ipAddress and @ipGeoDetails are accepted but only logged to LOG.GeneralLog. Never used in validation or business logic. Could be removed or documented as logging-only.
Lines 152-154: Two user GUIDs hardcoded in ExcludedUsers CTE for Activity, Login, and Portal metrics. No documentation of why these users are excluded. Appears to filter out test/system accounts.

Lines 323-359: Complex CASE statements with hardcoded OS and HC version numbers to determine 'outdated' status. Will require manual updates as new versions are released. Should be driven by a configuration table.

Lines 21-59: Two validation blocks (publicHasherId and accessToken) each SELECT an error rowset but do not RETURN. The @isError flag prevents logging duplicate errors, but if both validations fail, caller receives two error rowsets. Should RETURN after first error.

All queries use WITH (NOLOCK) hints. For a read-only admin dashboard this is acceptable, but the SP could return inconsistent data if run during active writes (e.g. integration job running concurrently).
Line 309: Concatenates FirstName + ' ' + LastName without COALESCE, which will return NULL if either name is NULL. Line 320-321 uses COALESCE on kennel names. Inconsistent NULL handling pattern.
Lines 398, 418: Uses hardcoded -2880 minutes (48 hours) for recent events window. Should be a variable or parameter for clarity.

Lines 98-99, 322, 352-357: Uses SUBSTRING/PATINDEX/CHARINDEX/LEFT/LIKE to parse HcVersion strings. If HcVersion format changes (no comma, different delimiter), queries will break. Should parse HcVersion in a more robust way or store version components separately.
Line 428: Uses SELECT DISTINCT * from a UNION subquery. While the column list is defined in the CTEs, using * makes the contract more fragile if CTE columns change.
Lines 391-394 and 411-414: Same subquery computing activityLastDay appears twice (once in RecentlyUpdated, once in MostActive). Could be computed once and included in UNION.

breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never change a sentinel value meaning (e.g. isIphone -1 = NULL)
Never change errorType integer codes without updating all callers
Never change the hardcoded excluded user GUIDs without coordinating with callers
Never change the dataType string values in UsageStatistics rowset (Account, Activity, Event, etc.)
Never change the highlight priority values (0-3) in LoginInformation rowset without updating UI
Never change the column order in any rowset - callers may depend on ordinal position
